headline: Super vs Grok — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Grok. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Grok

summary: Grok (xAI) is a fast‑moving, opinionated assistant with multi‑agent reasoning, live X data, and integrated image/video generation. Super is built for a different job: durable personal AI agents that actually operate computers and reuse a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. This page gives a fair comparison and shows when each tool fits best.
